pvOs.title: Manila Bay Coastal Rehabilitation
pvOs.description: [14.5842,120.9571] Rehabilitate 8km of Manila Bay coastline including seawall reinforcement, mangrove reforestation, promenade construction, and water quality improvement systems.

milestones.description: Mobilize equipment, reinforce 8km of seawall with steel and concrete. Clear debris, install safety barriers.
Plant 50,000 mangrove seedlings across designated zones. Install erosion control mats. Submit timestamped photos of planted areas.
Build 8km pedestrian promenade with lighting, benches, and viewing decks. Pave walkways. Install signage.
Install aeration systems, water monitoring sensors, and drainage filters. Test water quality at 10 sampling points. Handover documentation.

timeline.description: PVO created: Manila Bay Coastal Rehabilitation
Milestone #16 created (180,000,000 PHP)
Milestone #17 created (60,000,000 PHP)
Milestone #18 created (120,000,000 PHP)
Milestone #19 created (90,000,000 PHP)
Contractor assigned
Status: Proposed → Approved
Escrow #1 created - 180,000,000 PHP

pvOs.title: North Luzon Expressway Extension Phase III
pvOs.description: [15.1445,120.5894] Extend NLEX by 23km from Angeles to Tarlac City. 4-lane expressway with 3 interchanges, 2 toll plazas, drainage systems, and roadside safety barriers.

timeline.description: PVO created: North Luzon Expressway Extension Phase III

pvOs.title: Baguio City Water Supply Modernization
pvOs.description: [16.4023,120.596] Replace aging water distribution pipes across 12 barangays. Install new water treatment facility, 5 reservoir tanks, and smart metering for 45,000 households.

timeline.description: PVO created: Baguio City Water Supply Modernization

pvOs.title: Laoag International Airport Upgrade
pvOs.description: [18.1801,120.5332] Expand passenger terminal from 500 to 2,000 capacity. Extend runway to 2,800m for wide-body aircraft. Install navigation systems and 4 jet bridges.

timeline.description: PVO created: Laoag International Airport Upgrade

pvOs.title: Bicol Regional Hospital Trauma Center
pvOs.description: [13.1465,123.7365] Build 300-bed trauma and emergency center serving all 6 Bicol provinces. Include helipad, ICU with 50 beds, radiology with CT scan and MRI.

timeline.description: PVO created: Bicol Regional Hospital Trauma Center

pvOs.title: Cebu-Mactan Bridge Widening
pvOs.description: [10.3107,123.9494] Widen the existing Mactan-Mandaue bridge from 2 lanes to 4 lanes. Add pedestrian walkway and bicycle lane. Strengthen columns for seismic resilience.

timeline.description: PVO created: Cebu-Mactan Bridge Widening

pvOs.title: Iloilo River Flood Control System
pvOs.description: [10.6972,122.5631] Construct 15km of reinforced river embankments along the Iloilo River. Install 6 automatic floodgates, 4 pumping stations, and early warning system.

timeline.description: PVO created: Iloilo River Flood Control System

pvOs.title: Tacloban City Storm Surge Protection
pvOs.description: [11.2433,125.0036] Construct 8km of storm surge barrier wall along Tacloban coastline with integrated drainage and pumping. Build 5 evacuation centers.

timeline.description: PVO created: Tacloban City Storm Surge Protection

pvOs.title: Bohol Circumferential Road Completion
pvOs.description: [9.65,123.85] Complete the remaining 42km of the Bohol Circumferential Road linking all 47 municipalities. Includes 12 bridges and road widening in urban sections.

timeline.description: PVO created: Bohol Circumferential Road Completion

pvOs.title: Puerto Princesa Seaport Expansion
pvOs.description: [9.7352,118.7429] Construct 2 new berths for cargo and passenger vessels. Build warehouse complex, cold storage facility, and passenger terminal.

timeline.description: PVO created: Puerto Princesa Seaport Expansion

pvOs.title: Davao City Bypass Road Construction
pvOs.description: [7.0731,125.6128] Construct 45km bypass road around Davao City with 4 lanes, 2 tunnels through mountain sections, and 3 major bridges. Reduce city center traffic.

timeline.description: PVO created: Davao City Bypass Road Construction

pvOs.title: General Santos Fish Port Modernization
pvOs.description: [6.1164,125.1716] Modernize the country's largest tuna port with 4 new unloading berths, expanded cold storage, ice plant, and water treatment system.

timeline.description: PVO created: General Santos Fish Port Modernization

pvOs.title: Cagayan de Oro River Basin Dredging
pvOs.description: [8.4822,124.6472] Dredge 25km of the Cagayan de Oro River to increase depth from 2m to 6m. Remove silt and construct 8 riverbank stabilization structures.

timeline.description: PVO created: Cagayan de Oro River Basin Dredging

pvOs.title: Marawi Rehabilitation Housing Project
pvOs.description: [8.0036,124.285] Build 2,500 permanent housing units across 5 resettlement sites for families displaced by the 2017 Marawi siege. Include community centers and schools.

timeline.description: PVO created: Marawi Rehabilitation Housing Project

pvOs.title: Cotabato City Solar Power Farm
pvOs.description: [7.215,124.2483] Install 50MW solar photovoltaic farm across 80 hectares with battery storage of 20MWh. Connect to Mindanao grid through a new 69kV transmission line.

timeline.description: PVO created: Cotabato City Solar Power Farm
